description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a metallic silver slide and frame, complemented by a dark, textured grip. The slide features detailed serrations at the rear for improved handling, and the frame includes a beavertail grip safety and an extended thumb safety lever. The trigger is skeletonized with three holes, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is exposed at the muzzle, with a clean, polished finish and no visible threading or compensator. Markings and engravings are present on the slide, including manufacturer and model information, adding to its authenticity. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, with visible fasteners and a subtle bevel for easier reloading.
description: A silver semi-automatic handgun with a dark, textured grip, engraved slide, and a flat magazine base. Features include a skeletonized trigger, beavertail safety, and detailed slide serrations.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the engraved slide, textured grip, skeletonized trigger, and beavertail safety.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile displaying the slide serrations, grip texture, and magazine base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the hammer, rear sight, and the backstrap of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark gray with a textured, checkered pattern for enhanced traction and control. It features ergonomic contouring to fit the hand comfortably, with visible fasteners securing the grip panels. The surface appears to be made of a durable polymer or rubberized material, and there are no visible logos or finger grooves, giving it a clean, functional look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth finish and moderate thickness. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges. There are no visible texturing or accessory rails, maintaining a classic and functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a polished, unthreaded muzzle and a smooth, cylindrical profile. There are no visible ports, compensators, or fluting, and the exterior finish matches the metallic sheen of the slide. No additional markings are present on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on the left side, including the manufacturer's logo, model name, and caliber designation. The engravings are clear and prominent, located just above the trigger area and towards the rear of the slide. The right side of the slide appears to have minimal or no additional markings.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, featuring a subtle bevel for easier insertion and removal. It is secured with visible fasteners and lacks any finger extensions, logos, or additional texturing, maintaining a streamlined and functional design.
